pattern: Some skill tables put independent values in headers such as (1)効果 (自身) and (2)(3)効果 (編成内), leaving the plain 効果 column empty.
resolution: Build row_fact.effect from every header containing 効果 except duration/time columns, so labeled value extraction sees all effect columns.

pattern: ATK/DEF values can be formulas such as ATK +0.18×移動距離(km)% rather than plain numeric percentages.
resolution: Parse formula percentages before plain stat percentages and store value_unit=formula_percent with raw formula text; do not truncate the decimal as a normal number.

pattern: A single effect row can grant both 軽減不能なダメージ/固定ダメージ and 相手に経験値.
resolution: Split into fixed_damage and exp_gain components; when 相手 is present, set target_scope to opponent_denko. Treat 軽減不能なダメージ as fixed_damage for mismatch checks.

pattern: Supplemental effects may say a previous labeled effect fires again, such as (3)リンクしたとき(2)経験値付与がもう1回発動.
resolution: When a supplemental component references an earlier label of the same effect_kind and has no explicit new target phrase, inherit target_scope and target_filters from the referenced component.

pattern: Some useful effects are not plain ATK/DEF/EXP percentages, such as レーダー最大検知数+2 or これまでアクセスしたことのある駅へのランダムアクセス.
resolution: Create radar_detection_range and random_previous_station_access components instead of leaving rows without components.

pattern: A few pages still have high-risk semantic ambiguity after rule parsing.
resolution: Keep them in review_queue/report instead of force-filling: link continuation/transfer, VU-only duration/disable combinations, score increase-or-decrease branches, and complex labeled eco/attribute branches should go to manual or LLM snippet review.
